body_transformation: The Magikarp's rounded head retains its small crown but now glows with soft ivory-white metal texture, while its pale cream underbelly shifts to a delicate lavender patterned with petal gold stardust. Its bright orange body becomes a soft pastel pink with translucent crystalline scales that shimmer like starlight silver. The curled tail tip gains a subtle petal-like texture and faint lavender glow, matching the new body tone. Small delicate hooves replace the stubby legs, with soft rounded edges and a petal gold sheen on the pads.
signature_feature: Head crown: ivory-white metal with glowing starlight silver filigree and petal gold accents.
